title: View/User permissions for multiple closed workspaces
excerpt: Our department has multiple groups that use Monday.com and each group has their own closed workspace. There are often instances where an individual from group A needs to see the project activities of group B, but shouldn…

posts.author: Marsbars (Marissa Holmbeck)
posts.cookedHtml: Our department has multiple groups that use Monday.com and each group has their own closed workspace. There are often instances where an individual from group A needs to see the project activities of group B, but shouldn’t have any editing privileges within workspace B. It would be great to have the option to assign individuals as users/viewers within each closed workspace.

posts.author: biograf (Chris)
posts.cookedHtml: would be a nice feature for me too!
